---
title: "GPT-4 as a Nondeterministic Turing Machine"
description: "GPT-4 draws a different unicorn every hour even at temperature zero, making it the world's most nondeterministic Turing Machine."
author: synesis
date: "2023-03-30"
categories: [GPT-4, NLP, NLG, generative AI]
image: gpt4-unicorn-drawing.jpg
---

![](gpt4-unicorn-drawing.jpg)

If GPT4 is a Turing Machine, it's a very nondeterministic one: Yuntian Deng uses it to draw a unicorn every hour with T=0 at [[1]](#ref-1).

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_gpt4-nlp-nlproc-activity-7047216440873025536-MiwK).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] <https://openaiwatch.com/>
